extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts in the mid–high range (around 0.5–0.6) and stays mostly between 0.2 and 0.7 without touching the very bottom (near 0).  
R2: Has a pronounced single deep valley in the middle–late part but this valley does not reach the minimum of the scale (it bottoms out around 0.15–0.2, then recovers).  
R3: Late in the series, the values recover to a moderate level (around 0.4–0.6) and then fluctuate mildly without a strong second plunge.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts high (around 0.6–0.7) and quickly drops to a low region near the beginning (early sharp decline).  
R2: Contains at least one very deep valley in the middle–late part that reaches close to the minimum of the scale (near 0.0–0.1) before recovering.  
R3: After this deepest valley, the series rebounds back to moderate or high levels (around 0.4–0.6) and stays there without another comparably deep drop.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around a medium level (≈0.5–0.6) and shows a moderate rise or small peak within the first 5–10 time steps, then decreases.
R2: In the middle part (roughly time 15–45), the values fluctuate around a mid-range level (≈0.4–0.6) without staying very low (below ≈0.2) for long.
R3: After a sharp dip in the later segment (around time 45–55, values can briefly go near 0), the series recovers to medium levels (≈0.4–0.6) and ends there.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins at a medium-to-high level (≈0.6–0.7) and shows a strong overall downward movement in the first 10–15 time steps, reaching a pronounced low (≈0.1–0.2).
R2: From this early low, the series climbs steadily through the middle part (≈time 15–40), forming a broad hump that returns to medium or high values (≈0.5–0.7).
R3: In the last segment (after ≈time 45), the series again dips noticeably but then ends with a clear upward recovery to around medium level (≈0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around a medium value (~0.5–0.6), rises briefly, then drops clearly below 0.3 within the first 10–15 time steps.  
R2: In the middle section (roughly time 15–45) the values oscillate around a mid‑range level (about 0.4–0.6) without staying very high (>0.7) for long.  
R3: There is no sustained high plateau at the beginning; any high segment (>0.6–0.7) is short and followed quickly by a dip toward low values (<0.3).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a sustained high plateau (values mostly >0.6–0.7) for the first 5–10 time steps before it drops.  
R2: After the initial drop, the mid section again climbs to a clear peak above about 0.7 around the middle of the series.  
R3: The overall shape is “high–low–high–low–medium”: two pronounced high regions (early and mid-series) separated by a noticeable valley where values fall near 0.2 or below.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around a mid–high value (≈0.5–0.6) but never reaches very high values (maximum stays below ≈0.8).
R2: In the first third of the series there is a clear downward movement to a relatively low value (≈0.1–0.2) followed by only moderate recovery.
R3: In the last third, values oscillate in a middle band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without a strong final rise.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a mid–high value (≈0.6–0.7) and quickly drops to a low valley (≈0.1–0.2) within the first third.
R2: After this early valley, the series climbs to a pronounced high peak (≈0.7–0.8) around the middle of the sequence.
R3: In the last third, the series stays mostly in a middle band (≈0.3–0.6) without returning to the very low values of the early valley.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first major peak (within the first ~10% of the series) is moderate, staying below about 0.8.  
R2: After this first peak, the series remains in a middle band (roughly 0.2–0.6) without any very deep dip close to 0.  
R3: The lowest point of the series never approaches 0 (it stays clearly above, around ≥0.1–0.15).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts with a high plateau or peak (in the first ~10% of the series) that reaches around 0.7 or higher.  
R2: After this early high, there is a pronounced valley where the value drops close to 0 (a deep dip clearly below about 0.1–0.15).  
R3: Following this deep valley, the series rises back to mid or high values (above about 0.4) later in the sequence.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The value at the start (first 5–10 time steps) is moderately high (around 0.5–0.7) but not the maximum of the whole series.  
R2: The global maximum occurs in the middle third of the series (roughly time 20–45).  
R3: After the global maximum, the series dips clearly downward and ends at a moderate level (around 0.4–0.6), not recovering to the peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The value at the start (first 5–10 time steps) is very high and is close to or equal to the global maximum of the series.  
R2: The series then drops sharply from this early high to a clear local minimum in the first quarter of the time axis.  
R3: After this early drop, the series shows another sizable rise and peak in the middle third, but this middle peak does not exceed the very first high value.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Early segment (first third of the series) shows a clear drop from a high value (around 0.6–0.8) down to a much lower value (around 0.1–0.3).  
R2: Middle segment fluctuates moderately around a mid-level (roughly 0.4–0.6) without any very deep valley.  
R3: Late segment has a large downward spike into low values (around 0.0–0.2) followed by a recovery to mid values (around 0.3–0.6).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Early segment starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and drops, but not as low as class 0 (stays roughly above 0.2).  
R2: Middle segment stays relatively flat around a mid-level plateau (about 0.4–0.5) with only small oscillations.  
R3: Late segment again contains a pronounced valley into low values (around 0.1–0.2) that is followed by a sustained rise into mid–high values (around 0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around a mid‑range value (roughly 0.5–0.6) without a very high initial spike above ~0.7.  
R2: After the initial segment, the mid part (roughly indices 15–40) stays mostly in a narrow band around 0.4–0.6, with only moderate peaks (not exceeding ~0.7).  
R3: The deepest drop (near indices 45–55) goes down to the very low range (around 0.0–0.1) and is followed by a recovery that stays below about 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a clear high initial spike (above ~0.7) before dropping.  
R2: The mid section (roughly indices 15–40) shows one noticeable hump but generally stays in the mid range (about 0.3–0.6) without long flat parts.  
R3: After a pronounced deep drop around indices 45–55 to near 0.0–0.1, the final part of the series rises and remains in the mid–high range (about 0.4–0.6), without returning to very low values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The initial value is around the mid–high range (roughly 0.5–0.7) and does not start from a very low point.  
R2: The series shows one or more noticeable drops early or mid-sequence but never stays very close to zero for long; it quickly rebounds to mid-range values (around 0.3–0.6).  
R3: There is no prolonged flat plateau at a high level; peaks are moderate and followed by clear variability rather than long, sustained highs.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and within the first segment falls strongly toward low values (around 0.1–0.2).  
R2: After this early deep drop, the series climbs back to high values (around 0.6–0.8) at least once, creating a pronounced “V” or “U” shape early on.  
R3: The overall pattern has greater contrast, with both very low (near 0.1) and high (near 0.7–0.8) segments clearly present in the same sequence.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts around a mid–high value (~0.5–0.6) and within the first 10 time steps drops to a low value below 0.25.  
R2: After this initial drop, stays mostly in a mid-range band (approximately 0.25–0.65) without returning to very high values (>0.75).  
R3: The global maximum occurs in the middle part of the series (roughly between indices 20–45), not at the very beginning.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts at a high value (~0.6–0.7) and within the first 10 time steps drops sharply to near the minimum of the series (≈0.1–0.2).  
R2: After this drop, the series climbs again to a pronounced peak above 0.7 around the middle (roughly indices 30–40).  
R3: The overall range (max − min) is large (≈0.6 or more), with both very low (<0.2) and very high (>0.7) points present.
